hero.headlineTop: You don't have a study problem.
hero.subtitle: Upload any PDF or notes — Quibly's AI creates flashcards and quizzes in seconds. Earn XP, build streaks, and level up as you learn. Every day.

steps.step1Desc: Upload any study material — PDFs, slides, notes. Our AI processes it instantly.
steps.step2Desc: Get flashcards with images and quizzes with multiple-choice questions, all generated from your content.
steps.step3Desc: Study daily to build streaks, earn XP, and progress through levels. Consistency beats talent.

features.card1Desc: AI identifies what matters most in your material and creates flashcards with images. Less time studying, more time remembering.
features.card2Title: Quizzes that expose your blind spots
features.card2Desc: Automatically generated from your content. Find out what you really know — and what you just think you know — before the exam does.

oneTool.headline: One app. Every subject. Zero excuses.
oneTool.paragraph1: Biology, law, history, engineering — Quibly doesn't care what you study. Upload a PDF and the AI creates personalized study material in seconds.
oneTool.paragraph2: Streaks keep you accountable. XP keeps you motivated. The only thing left is you showing up.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.freeDesc: Start generating flashcards and quizzes — no credit card required.
pricing.proDesc: Unlock more daily generations and priority AI processing.

faq.headline: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first streak.
faq.a1: Quibly takes your study material — PDFs, slides, or notes — and uses AI to generate flashcards and quizzes automatically. You earn XP and build streaks as you study, making learning a daily habit.
faq.q2: What file formats can I upload?
faq.a2: Currently PDF files. We're working on support for images, slides, and direct text input.
faq.q3: What are XP, streaks and levels?
faq.a3: XP (experience points) are earned by studying — reviewing flashcards and answering quiz questions. Streaks track your daily study consistency. Levels progress as you accumulate XP: Beginner, Student, Master, Genius.
faq.a4: Yes. The Free plan gives you 1 generation per day for both flashcards and quizzes. The Pro plan ($9.99/month) unlocks 5 generations per day and priority processing.
faq.a5: Yes! Quibly supports English and Portuguese (BR), and the AI understands and generates content in 50+ languages.
faq.a6: Absolutely. We use encryption and follow GDPR and LGPD regulations. Your documents are private and never used to train AI models.
faq.q7: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a7: Yes, cancel anytime with zero fees. You keep Pro access until the end of your billing cycle.
faq.q8: How does the image feature work?
faq.a8: When generating flashcards, our AI creates search queries to find relevant illustrations for each card, making your study material more visual and memorable.
faq.supportText: We're here to help you get the most out of Quibly.

cta.headline: While you're thinking about it, someone else is already studying.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students who turned wasted study time into real results. Free to start — your first streak is waiting.
cta.trustLine: Free forever • No credit card required • Web app

footer.tagline: AI-powered study tools that make you unstoppable.
